verdict_reason: The full-width grid wrapper is correct and centralises width per the ticket, but renaming the inner block to pageContent silently orphans 3 pages still overriding {% block content %} which keep their own two-thirds layout.

todos.issue: Renaming the inner block to pageContent leaves 3 pages (about/index.njk, error/index.njk, auth/unauthorised.njk) still overriding {% block content %}, so they bypass the new govuk-grid-column-full wrapper and keep their own two-thirds grid — width is no longer 'defined in one place' for them.
todos.fix: Migrate about, error and unauthorised templates to {% block pageContent %} and drop their local govuk-grid-row/two-thirds wrappers, or record in the ticket that these pages intentionally stay two-thirds.
